Decision flow

1) User or Bot selects target/context (resolvers filled from chat input or UI). 2) Validate preconditions; WireError + abort if missing required state. 3) Open Transaction, perform deterministic steps, WireRecoverable on any fallback. 4) Bot → MCP success summary. User → ribbon toast + chat + audit trail. 5) Failure on either path → `ErrorWire.WireFault` + `CentralWarningLogger.LogError` with structured payload.
